function.rulebook_notes: Bootstrapped with tree, AGENTS.MD, context; inspected 99_system as required; used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-23. In 10_entities/cast/lukas.md, birthday is 1988-03-26, which is the nearest upcoming birthday among discovered cast birthday dates. A cast-wide date search for '-03-26' found no other birthday entries on that date, so no tie applies.
